title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext AI model successfully predicted the intensity and track of Hurricane Melissa in October 2025, providing advance notice that enabled evacuation warnings in Jamaica. The model demonstrates improved hurricane forecasting accuracy through collaboration with the National Hurricane Center.
